title: Totem of Luck
description: Adds a new totem for Minecraft
body:
[](https://github.com/Weatheraintbad/TotemofLuck)    [](https://github.com/Weatheraintbad/TotemofLuckForge)    [](https://github.com/Weatheraintbad/TotemofLuckNeoForge) ### 为我的世界添加了新的图腾：幸运图腾！ ### Adds a new totem for Minecraft: Totem of Luck!
### 幸运图腾(Totem of Luck) totemofluck:totem_of_luck 在创造模式下位于原版战斗用品栏，可使用钻石、金锭和不死图腾合成。 Totem of Luck (totemofluck:totem_of_luck) is located in the original battle inventory in Creative Mode and can be crafted using diamonds, gold ingots, and totem of undying.

### 玩家手持幸运图腾破坏方块、击杀生物、进食时会有一定概率获得60秒的随机正向Buff，手持幸运图腾死亡后也会获得强于不死图腾的效果。 When players break blocks, kill creatures, or eat with a lucky totem, they will have a chance to get a random positive buff for 60 seconds, and they will also get an effect stronger than totem of undying after dying with the lucky totem.
### 目前支持的版本 Currently supported versions： - **Fabric 1.19.3 / 1.19.4 / 1.20.1 / 1.20.2 / 1.20.3 / 1.20.4 / 1.21.1**（需要 Fabric Loader 0.16.14 以及上版本，Fabric API任意版本）。
(requires Fabric Loader 0.16.14 or higher, any version of Fabric API). - **Forge 1.20.1**（需要 Forge Loader 47 及以上版本）。
(requires Forge Loader 47 or higher). - **NeoForge 1.21.1** （需要NeoForge 21.1.216 及以上版本）。
(requires NeoForge 21.1.216 or higher.)
